CHAPTER TWO: SETTING THE TARGET
PAGE 02
1
Diya's town had no strong computer-applications college.
Do I have to move away?
2
Leaving home for a distant campus felt daunting.
So far from my family?
3
Then she found a recognised BCA she could do online.
Tech college, from home!
4
Now she studies at home, her degree on track.
No move, a full degree.

Why An Online BCA Just Works

  • 1
    Study 100% online from anywhere. No relocation, no hostel, no commute.
  • 2
    The same UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ BCA as on-campus, recognised everywhere.
  • 3
    Just ₹1,47,000 for the full 3-year BCA (₹49,000/year), with 0% interest EMI or a discount on upfront payment.
  • 4
    Weekend live classes plus recordings, so learning fits around your life.
